name: 信仰力评估模块10处any类型 — 类型安全违规
description:
services/api/src/modules/faith-assessment/ 残留10处any:
- controller.ts:39,63 — @Req() req: any → 定义RequestWithUser接口{user:{id:string}}
- service.ts:46 — mode as any → 用Prisma.AssessmentMode枚举
- service.ts:75 — (q: any) → 定义QuestionWithOptions接口
- service.ts:92-93 — (question as any).options, (o: any) → 用定义的接口
- service.ts:97 — (question as any).dimension → 同上
- service.ts:144 — dto.mode as any → 枚举对齐
- service.ts:266 — (m: any) → 定义GroupByResult接口
- service.ts:289 — mode as any → 枚举对齐

铁律: R-01(严禁any类型，必须定义Interface/DTO)
验证: pnpm --filter @zuting/api build
